latest_evidence_summary: Architecture Profile boundaries were split so src/architecture/profile.ts only resolves, lists, and writes profiles; builtin profile content lives in src/architecture/builtin-profiles.ts; objective descriptor, normalization, and validation live in src/architecture/profile-model.ts; shared technical baseline shape helpers live in src/architecture/technical-baseline.ts and are reused by baseline validation. Architecture profiles, doctor/status, focused CLI tests, architecture tests, typecheck, and diff checks passed.
